description: APEC Coin (APEC) emerged in 2023 on Ethereum as a multi-chain digital asset symbolizing unity, development, and shared prosperity across Asia-Pacific economies. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 APEC gives all APEC holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: APEC Coin
